name: Fired Stone Tavern
about: Fired Stone Tavern is part of The Compound Defiance, a larger entertainment venue that includes golf courses and wineries. It operates as a full-service tavern focused on providing food and drinks in a casual social setting. The tavern offers wood-fired pizzas, burgers, and various appetizers alongside a bar serving beverages, making it a destination for dining and social gatherings rather than a dedicated golf simulator facility. It appears to be a social hub with an emphasis on its food and drink offerings rather than on technical golf simulation.
why_golfers_like_it: Part of a larger entertainment complex with adjacent golf venues
Social atmosphere for post-golf relaxation and dining
Offers a full bar and food menu for a complete outing experience

food_and_drink.notes: Full tavern menu with wood-fired pizzas, burgers, wings, calzones, sandwiches, and appetizers. Features monthly specials and a dedicated gluten-friendly option.
Full bar service with various beer options. No specific BYOB policy mentioned.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are not provided as Fired Stone Tavern does not have golf simulators. It is a dining and drinking establishment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not permitted. Fired Stone Tavern offers a full menu of wood-fired pizzas, burgers, wings, and a complete bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This is not applicable as Fired Stone Tavern does not have golf simulators. The venue is a restaurant and bar.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Fired Stone Tavern is family-friendly and includes a kids' eat free program with a side and sundae bar available.
